data.summary: Transitioning from 7 years in finance to software engineering, bringing analytical thinking, data-driven decision making, and project management skills. Completed intensive coding bootcamp and built portfolio of full-stack projects. Seeking software engineering role to apply technical skills and business acumen.

experience.title: Full-Stack Developer
experience.description: Built 5+ full-stack web applications using React, Node.js, Python, and PostgreSQL. Implemented RESTful APIs, user authentication, and database design. Deployed applications using AWS (EC2, S3, RDS) and Docker.

experience.title: Software Engineering Bootcamp
experience.description: Intensive 6-month program covering full-stack web development. Technologies: JavaScript, Python, React, Node.js, SQL, MongoDB, Git. Completed 20+ projects including capstone project (team of 4). Graduated with honors (top 10% of cohort).

experience.title: Senior Financial Analyst
experience.description: Analyzed financial data and built predictive models using Excel, SQL, and Python to support strategic decision-making. Automated reporting processes using Python scripts, reducing manual work by 15 hours per week. Collaborated with cross-functional teams including engineering, product, and operations.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Business Administration - Finance
